MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th June, 2018 G.S.R. 565(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rules (1) and (2) of rule 4 of the Indian Administrative Service (Cadre) Rules, 1954, the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Maharashtra, hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, namely:— 1. (1) These Regulations may be called the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Amendment Regulations, 2018. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Administrative Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1955, in the Schedule, for the heading “Maharashtra” and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted namely:─ “Maharashtra Senior Duty Posts under the State Government 225 Chief Secretary to Government 1 Additional Chief Secretary to Government 7 Principal Secretary to Government 24 Principal Secretary & Special Inquiry Officer 1 Principal Secretary & Chief Protocol Officer 1 Principal Secretary & Chief Electoral Officer 1 Principal Secretary cum Commissioner 3 Principal Secretary cum Commissioner (VP & CEO-MHADA) 1 Principal Secretary cum Commissioner (DG-YASHADA) 1 Divisional Commissioner 6 Secretary to Government 20 Secretary to Governor 1 Commissioner of Sales Tax 1 Settlement Commissioner and Director, Land Records 1 Commissioner, Sugar 1 Commissioner for Co-operation & Registrar of Co-operative Societies 1 Development Commissioner, Industries 1 Commissioner, Excise 1 Secretary to the Chief Minister 1 Resident Commissioner, Maharashtra Sadan, New Delhi 1 Transport Commissioner 1 Dairy Development Commissioner 1 Commissioner, Food & Drugs Administration 1 Commissioner of Employee State Insurance Scheme 1 Commissioner of Agriculture 1 Commissioner of Tribal Development 1 Commissioner, Employment & Self Employment 1 Commissioner of Small Savings & State Lotteries 1 Commissioner, Animal Husbandry 1 Commissioner, Women & Child Welfare 1 -- 5 of 14 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] Commissioner, Labour 1 Commissioner, Integrated Child Development Scheme 1 Director, Municipal Administration 1 Secretary-Cum-Commissioner/Addl. Commissioner 9 Commissioner, Education 1 Inspector General of Registration 1 Joint Secretary/Addl. Secretary/Special Secretary 15 Collector 36 Chief Executive Officer, Zilla Parishad 34 Special Commissioner of Sales Tax 1 Joint Commissioner of Sales Tax 5 Director of Social Welfare 1 Additional Divisional Commissioner 2 Director, Textiles 1 Controller of Rationing 1 Additional Commissioner, Tribal Development 2 Commissioner, Sports & Youth Services 1 Director General, Information & Public Relation 1 Commissioner persons with Physical Disabilities 1 Secretary, State Election Commission 1 Director, VJNT 1 Director, IT 1 Director, Tourism 1 Director, Sericulture 1 Commr-Family Welfare & Dir. NHM 1 Commissioner-Fisheries 1 Director-Cum-Commissioner (Municipal Commissioner) Pimpri-Chinchwa, Kolhapur, Solapur, Sangli-Miraj Kupwad, Aurangabad, Amaravati, Akola, Nanded-Waghala City, Meera- Bhayander, Vasai-Virara, Ulhasnagar, Bhiwandi-Nijampur, Kalyan-Dombivali, Malegaon, Panvel 15 Director, VANAMATI 1 Director General MEDA 1 Director, Disaster Management 1 1 Total Senior Duty Posts 225 2 Central Deputation Reserve not exceeding 40% of item 1 above 90 3 State Deputation Reserve not exceeding 25% of item 1 above 56 4 Training Reserve not exceeding 3.5% of item 1 above 07 5 Leave Reserve and Junior Posts Reserve not exceeding 16.5% of Item 1 above 37 6 Posts to be filled by promotion under Rule 8 of the Indian Administrative Service (Recruitment) Rules, 1954 not exceeding 33 1/3% of Item 1, 2, 3 & 4 above 126 7 Posts to be filled up by Direct Recruitment (Items 1+2+3+4+5-6) 289 Total Authorised Strength 415” [F. No. 22012/10/2015-AIS-II(A)] JYOTSNA GUPTA, Under Secy. -- 6 of 14 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 7 Note 1: Prior to the issue of this notification, the Total Authorized Strength of Maharashtra IAS Cadre was 361. Note 2: The principal Regulations were published in the Gazette of India vide SRO No. 3350, dated 22.10.1955.
